notableEvents.label: Cal Raleigh GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cal Raleigh grounds into a double play, shortstop Jim Jarvis to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jhonny Pereda scores. Leo Rivas to 3rd. J.P. Crawford out at 2nd. Cal Raleigh out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cal Raleigh rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cal Raleigh grounds into a double play, shortstop Jim Jarvis to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jhonny Pereda scores. Leo Rivas to 3rd. J.P. Crawford out at 2nd. Cal Raleigh out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone flies out to left fielder Michael Harris II.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Mike Yastrzemski scores.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Eduard Bazardo picks off Jorge Mateo at 1st on throw to first baseman Josh Naylor.
